case_title: JOANIE MCCOLLOM VS. MONOGRAM APARTMENT COLLECTION

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCOLLOM, JOANIE AS TO DEFENDANT MONOGRAM APARTMENT COLLECTION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCOLLOM, JOANIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONOGRAM APARTMENT COLLECTION $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 INTEREST, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,175.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,500.00 AWARDED DUE TO DEFENDANT'S BAD FAITH FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (C). DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $302.82, AN AMOUNT WHICH HAS ALREADY BEEN PAID TO PLAINTIFF BY DEFENDANT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
(SC-108) ANSWER TO REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCOLLOM, JOANIE AS TO DEFENDANT MONOGRAM APARTMENT COLLECTION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-06-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MONOGRAM APARTMENT COLLECTION
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SC-108) FILED BY DEFENDANT MONOGRAM APARTMENT COLLECTION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT 0N 10/19/16 RETURNED BY U.S. POSTAL SERVICE LABELED "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MONOGRAM APARTMENT COLLECTION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,514.53 FILED BY MCCOLLOM, JOANIE AS TO DEFENDANT MONOGRAM APARTMENT COLLECTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-18-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-18-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JOANIE MCCOLLOM. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER ON (SC-108)REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS DENIED.
